name: Moving Average Filter
description: Smooths noisy sensor data using a configurable window moving average
author: NISystem
code:
# Moving Average Filter
# Smooths noisy sensor data

window_size = config.get('window_size', 10)
input_tag = config.get('input_tag', 'Temperature_1')

# Get current value
current = tags.get(input_tag, 0)

# Initialize history buffer if needed
if 'buffer' not in state:
    state['buffer'] = []

# Add to buffer
state['buffer'].append(current)

# Keep only window_size samples
if len(state['buffer']) > window_size:
    state['buffer'] = state['buffer'][-window_size:]

# Calculate average
filtered = sum(state['buffer']) / len(state['buffer'])

# Publish result
publish(f'py.{input_tag}_Filtered', filtered)
